title: hedyotis lindleyana var. hirsuta
intro: Hedyotis lindleyana var. hirsuta, also known as the hairy Hedyotis, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to its chemical composition. The hairy Hedyotis has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems, thanks to its expectorant and antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or extracts, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine for its therapeutic benefits.
